reviews.review_description: Ill start by saying that Ive never played these kind of Dating Sim or Gal Games before, but this one caught me eye. Visually, it has a good style to it, and the story seems interesting with a bit of sci fi and paranormal mixed in. I love narrative driven games, and this definitely fits the bill. Im really enjoying it so far.

reviews.review_title: The top VR galgame out there
reviews.review_description: This is the definitive KAMITSUBAKI experience. That funny whack-a-mole from the PC version now transforms into truly intense combat. The characters feel very lifelike and are super cute.

So disappointed.. its languages is only available for Japanese, Chinese, and another language. The English translated version won’t be availed till a future update?! So why bother releasing it in the western market?

Revision to my first review: First half hour in and I am already mesmerized. Just WOW! I’m sold! Absolutely worth the wait for English mode since its launch in December. Visually stunning, the girls and the setting. Narrating is great and the story so far is like straight out of a manga. You’re basically in control of a body in a parallel world and you have to save school girls from danger. Unfortunately it’s a story novel gameplay so doesn’t feel immersive as I’d like to be. Don’t see your hands or body at all and every action is controlled by the store. But the amazing visual quality, music, and great voice acting definitely makes up for it. The first girl you encounter sings! And it’s sung beautifully. A MUST HAVE! I have to sing a Star just because it’s not full vr immersion. But otherelse was executed perfectly!

*I've brought the limit version from findmestore*

This game is totally a scam. Before the release, all kinds of promotions mentioned support for four languages. However, on the launch day, except for Japanese, all other languages have to wait for subsequent updates. The developer has done nothing and made no announcements on social media. It's hard to imagine this is the behavior of a normal game developer.👎

developer_response.body:
We sincerely apologize that English and Chinese language support was not available at launch, and that we failed to communicate this clearly in advance.
We are currently taking additional time to further polish and improve the quality of each language.
Support for English and Chinese is planned to be added via an update in early 2026.
We understand this is disappointing, and we truly appreciate your patience and understanding while we work on this.
Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.

reviews.review_title: Great looking game BUT ENGLISH NEEDED
reviews.review_description: So sad that a great game will get negative reviews because the devs had not implemented the most common language yet. It is supposed to be available with an update at some point.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
Support for English and Chinese is planned to be added via an update in early 2026.
We apologize for the inconvenience and kindly ask for your patience.

reviews.review_description: Now the dlc can be played at chapter selection.
Nice story and songs. And finally update 1.03. Now DLC works.

reviews.review_title: Hope the update comes very very soon
reviews.review_description: My only complaint is there’s no English is they’re gonna be English voice or is it just gonna be English translated words pre-ordered hoping it was in English, but sadly mistaken

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
We plan to add English text translation, while voice audio will remain Japanese only.
This update is scheduled for early 2026.
We kindly ask for your patience in the meantime.
